---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Call tool `...` with arguments `...`
2. Observe `...`

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or unexpected output if applicable.

```
paste error output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.9 |
| prompt-optimizer-mcp version | e.g. 0.2.0 |
| MCP client | e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, custom |
| LLM provider (if enabled) | e.g. anthropic, openai, none |

## Tool that failed

Which MCP tool triggered the issue? (e.g. `optimize_prompt`, `analyze_prompt`, `optimize_and_run`)

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or configuration snippets that might help.
